resources.string: The camera permission is now enabled.
The camera permission is permanently denied.
Cannot use the scanned QR code
The scanned QR code didn’t contain a digital credential. Please check the correct QR code to scan, then try again.
Please enable the camera permission to continue.
There was a problem with your connection

Your connection with the person checking your document is not working.

You’ll need to show them a new QR code to set up a new connection.

Nothing has been shared.
Try again with a new QR code
